name: huanwrite
description: Local novel production and submission workbench.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/shared packages/core packages/server packages/cli packages/web
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/cleanup-e2e.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -Command "npm.cmd exec playwright test -- --headed; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; npm.cmd run cleanup:e2e; exit $code"
scripts.verify: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.verify:e2e: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run test:e2e
